expectations.text: Settings grouped in rounded containers with large radius
Each setting has an icon from lucide-react in a colored rounded box
expectations.evidence: Line 57: 'p-2.5 rounded-2xl' with icon inside each Toggle component

expectations.text: Section titles use uppercase tracking-widest labels
expectations.evidence: Line 551: 'text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em]' for Danger Zone label

expectations.text: Cards use border border-white subtle edge

expectations.evidence: Lines 51-82: Reusable Toggle component with consistent spring animation
Lines 250-253: 'initial={{ opacity: 0 }} animate={{ opacity: 1 }}' on page; Lines 178-180: staggered section animations

suggestions.reason: Without-skill settings page also passes all assertions because it happened to use Sanctuary theme tokens. The assertions may not be discriminating enough for this eval — consider adding checks for serif italic section headings or decorative glow blobs.

eval_feedback.overall: Without-skill output coincidentally follows many Sanctuary patterns. Assertions need to be more discriminating.
